_comment: MEASURED baseline for the skill-matching eval (evals/skill-matching/suite.test.mjs). CI gates NON-REGRESSION: recall/precision must not fall below these and suppressRate must not rise above. Layers: phrase-level negatives + trigram morphology + state-conditional re-rank (lane/gate priors, lane-skill force-include, DN-5 domain prior). Stateless paraphrases without workflow context remain RED pending the intent-gated menu (a later phase). Regenerate when a fix raises the numbers.
